creator: takefu@airport.fm
text:
Created attachment 220773
pkg-1.15.10_1.patch

Reference url
https://subatomicsolutions.org/8-freebsd/14-portsnap

It will be solved by following after applying this patch.
  /etc/periodic.conf
    pkg_version_flags=-vP
